transitionPlan.context: Emma starts at Westgrove next year. Craig teaches there (math), which helps. The center of the whole thing is keeping her steady through the change.

keyDates.date: Last day at Cedarbrook before winter break.
Westgrove orientation (Jean attends; joins society meeting by video call).

toSort.item: Soccer continuity, confirm Coach Walsh's league versus school-team timing.
Art class, find the middle-school equivalent; she should not lose that.
Bus versus ride-with-Craig logistics (he is already on site).
Friend group, two girls from Cedarbrook are also going; arrange a meet-up.

transitionPlan.watchingFor: She gets quiet when she is anxious rather than loud. Build in low-key check-ins, not interrogations. Keep the Wednesday art-and-Irish-cooking evening as an anchor; she likes the routine even if she will not say so.
